title: Subarray Sum Equals K
hints: Use prefix sum array to efficiently calculate subarray sums.
For subarray from index l to r, sum = pf[r] - pf[l-1] = B.
This means pf[r] - B = pf[l-1], so we need to find how many prefix sums equal pf[r] - B.
Use a hashmap to count occurrences of each prefix sum.
For each prefix sum x, check if target = x - B exists in hashmap and add its count.
Also count prefix sums that directly equal B (subarrays starting from index 0).
